item.title: v0.2.1
item.description:
Polish + AI scaffold

  • Cross-layout fixes no longer oscillate on real words ("стороны" / "сторони").
  • Standalone "ы" / "э" now correct to "і" / "є" without needing a dictionary lookup.
  • Configurable hotkey: double-tap Shift / right Cmd / right Option.
  • Menu-bar icon replaces the "⌥" placeholder; dims when paused.
  • Refined overlay animation (180° flip, split-spring timing) + Preview button.
  • AI scaffold ready for Apple Intelligence integration (opt-in, dormant by default).
  • README ships with screenshots and animation GIFs.

item.title: v0.2.0
item.description:
First public release

Auto-flip on the fly between EN ↔ UK ↔ RU. Manual hotkey via double-tap Shift (configurable in Preferences). Selection mode for fixing whole sentences. Self-learning Backspace. Cross-layout letter fixes (ы↔і, э↔є). Sticky-shift correction. Per-app blacklist + built-in silence in terminals and password managers. Bouncy icon-flip overlay. Launch at login. Bundled ~45 k UK and ~48 k RU dictionaries.

Signed with a Developer ID and notarized by Apple. Auto-update via Sparkle from this point forward.
